name: proxymanager
description: Manage a ProxyManager clash/mihomo configuration through skills and the ProxyManager MCP bridge.

interface.longDescription: Use ProxyManager skills to inspect and safely edit routing rules, rule sets, proxy groups, subscriptions, DNS, sniffer, TUN, and node-processing operators through the ProxyManager backend.
defaultPrompt: 检查我的 ProxyManager 配置并解释当前分流
把一个域名加入 ProxyManager 分流规则
优化 clash/mihomo 规则和策略组
